title: Heat wave conditions continue on Thursday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather update from the South African Weather Service, extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the Hantam local municipality (N. Cape) and the Cederberg, Breede River Valley, Langeberg, Laingsburg, Prince Albert, Oudtshoorn and Hessequa local municipalities in the Western Cape tomorrow, 20 March.

Extremely uncomfortable conditions are expected over the interior and south-western coast of the Western Cape, and the south-western parts of the Northern Cape today, 19 March but only over the interior of the Garden Route District tomorrow, 20 March.


> Forecast temperatures for Thursday 20 March:

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
